intent: Single-screen Bezugsberechtigung change form for a life-insurance policy: bezugsart radio plus three repeating beneficiary rows (name, relationship, percentage quote) with a sum-equals-100 plausibility constraint.
notes: Tier-2 insurance baseline (sum-constraint + three-row repeating group): the first beneficiary row is unconditionally Required, rows two and three are conditionally Required on their own name field. Quote validations carry both per-row range (1..100 with 2 decimals on row one) and the cross-field sum constraint surfaced via a RESULT_DISPLAY whose text states the required total without inventing the rounding mode. The unwiderruflich-disclaimer is INFORMATIVE_LABEL only and must NOT be paraphrased into a concrete change rule the source does not specify (rubric section 5).
